text:
K. Schneider • Added new valid values to PRVDR_CLSFCTN_CD 
• Added new valid value “N” to PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS, which 
resulted in downstream addition of this code to all the 
dichotomous taxonomy indicator variables in the APR base file. 
The following indicator variables also had one or more additional 
taxonomy code added to the definition 
ALPTHC_OSTPTHC_PHYSN_TXNMY_IND, 
BHVRL_HLTH_SCL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND, DNTL_TXNMY_IND, 
DTRY_NTRTNL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND, 
OTHR_INDVDL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND,
